name: Labrador Retriever
description: Friendly and outgoing. Excellent for families and service work.

name: German Shepherd
description: Confident and courageous. Highly trainable for police and military work.

name: Poodle
description: Lively and active. Excellent temperament and keen intelligence.

name: Golden Retriever
description: Intelligent and devoted. Gentle and friendly temperament.

name: Beagle
description: Merry and curious. Originally bred for hunting in packs.

name: Border Collie
description: Extremely intelligent and workable. High energy and highly trainable.

name: Belgian Malinois
description: Confident with strong guarding instinct. Excellent working dog.
